title: BetterEnd/BetterNether - Create Recipe Compat
description: adds mechanical saw recipes  for BetterEnd/BetterNether logs
body:
adds [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) mechanical saw recipes for [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) and [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) logs 
- Log stripping with Mechanical Saw
- Planks producing with Mechanical Saw

![adds mechanical saw recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17f7fa0265af1a26e084b542592db6b4ac509b77.png)
![Planks producing with Mechanical Saw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48307fbc9cc35fe7522d1f282b0bbc01a08ecf0d.png)
